hooks.command: result=$(agentpack status 2>&1); code=$?; if [ $code -ne 0 ]; then agentpack pack --task auto --mode balanced 2>/dev/null && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "agentpack context was stale and has been auto-repacked"}}' || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "agentpack context is STALE — run agentpack pack --task to refresh"}}'; fi
